title: Tian Tian Lu Cup
content:
Tian Tian Lu Cup

## Sponsors

Thanks to the sponsorship of [Kecare](https://www.kecare.me), the best static site generation framework in the world, meow.

Thanks to the sponsorship of the world's best Ts full-stack framework [milkio](https://www.milkio.fun) meow

Thank you for the sponsorship of the world's best personal development award, the [Fioralune Awards](https://www.fioralune.com), meow~

No other sponsors accepted meow!!!!!!!

## About This Event

This tournament was inspired by seeing a series of bizarre experiences from Xpl, and we felt that grassroots CS could also have better tournaments. So the Tian Tian Lu Cup was born. This Tian Tian Lu Cup was fully funded by me personally. It is a single-elimination tournament where 8 teams compete in all matches as Bo3.

### Time Schedule

Because this is the first time the tournament has been held, it's mainly for fun. Friendship first, competition second, meow. If you're purely after competitive gameplay, you don't need to join our Tian Tian Lu Cup meow—we're here for fun, meow. The registration rank limit is from C+ to defense S meow. No higher ranks, meow.

Our idea is that after players sign up, the event organizers will divide them into balanced groups based on their skill levels. The players will then have a week of preparation time (bushi), followed by a 3-day tournament.

What is the registration deadline?

When will registration start? 40 people (8 teams) is the direct cutoff.

Within two days after the registration deadline, the event team will divide the groups. Members can choose a captain and a team name on their own. The captain will be responsible for map selection and ban/pick (BP) in the subsequent Bo3 matches.

What is the start time of the match?

The original plan was to hold the first round of the quarterfinals (8 advancing to 4) on July 20.

The second round of the semi-finals (4 into 2) will be held on July 21.

The third-place match and final will be held on July 22.

It lasts three days in total.

### Tournament Prize Money?

First of all, thank a certain group friend for sponsoring 5 pieces of M&G erasers to be distributed to the 5 champions.

Secondly, thanks to a certain group friend for sponsoring one piece of M&G eraser.

Because it was entirely funded by me personally, I don't have much money meow. So the competition is mainly for entertainment, don't come to stomp on weaker players for a few dollars and affect meow.

Champion: 250 RMB + 5 pieces of M&G erasers (One KFC meal per person, meow)

Runner-up 150 RMB

Third place 50 RMB

For the rest, I will personally bear the cost of one M&G eraser per person. Alright,

### Will there be live streaming or commentary, meow?

There will be a livestream, exclusive on Bilibili meow. But there might not be commentary meow, because I can't afford it meow, I don't have money meow. I'll try to contact some Bilibili uploaders to see if they can provide commentary meow. I don't have money meow.

### Volunteer?

I don't have money meow, so I might need volunteers working for love to help with promotion/editing/event planning/organizing and other activities meow. If you're interested and enthusiastic, welcome welcome meow. We'll be good friends meow.

### Sponsorship?

We do not accept sponsorship from any individuals or organizations, meow.

The taste changes once money is involved, meow. No sponsorships are accepted at present, meow. Since it is funded by myself, the final interpretation right belongs to me, meow. This is a recreational competition, meow. If you cause trouble, get out, meow.

### Follow-up?

If this event goes smoothly and receives good feedback, then it will continue to hold the Tian Tian Lu Cup S2 in mid-August meow, which is also funded by me meow, and it's an entertainment competition meow.

Later, you can vote to choose the game content, meow. Anything for fun is fine, meow.

### Professional Development?

I won't meow, because I have no money meow, and I have no time meow, I need to work. It will always be just a fun competition.

### How to join us meow

![image-20260704093444493](/assets/tiantianlubei.png)

## Thanks again

Thank you to the best static site generation framework in the world [Kecare](kecare.me) for sponsoring meow.

Thanks for the sponsorship from the best TS full-stack framework [milkio](milkio.fun) meow

Thank you for the sponsorship of the [Fioralune Awards](fioralune.com), which will be the best personal development award in the world, meow.

If you are interested in or have knowledge of programming, and are interested in participating in the development of my Kecare framework, then you are welcome.

![image-20260704093552371](/assets/kecaregroups.png)
